hero.headline: Ship in every language.
hero.subheading: Connect your repo, edit strings with AI, publish via PR. Translation management built for dev teams.

step1.title: Install
step1.description: Install the GitHub App and grant read or read+write access.

step2.title: Scan
step2.description: Loki detects your .arb and .json files. Pick your source branch.

step3.title: Edit
step3.description: Edit, add, or delete keys with AI suggestions inline.

step4.title: Publish
step4.description: Link a ticket, Loki opens a PR. Or download files if read-only.

githubNative.title: GitHub Native
githubNative.description: Install the app, pick a repo and branch. No config files.

aiSuggestions.title: AI Suggestions
aiSuggestions.description: DeepL + Claude suggest translations as you type.

prPublish.title: PR-based Publish
prPublish.description: Loki creates the branch and opens the PR. You review and merge.

ticketLinking.title: Ticket Linking
ticketLinking.description: Link Jira or GitHub Issues to your translation PR.

fileFormats.title: .arb + .json
fileFormats.description: Flutter and web projects supported out of the box.

readOnly.title: Read-only mode
readOnly.description: No write access? Download files and manage the PR yourself.

free.name: Free
free.description: For indie devs and small projects.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For teams shipping in multiple languages.

team.name: Team
team.description: For orgs with multiple repos and members.

onboarding.readWriteDesc: Loki creates branches and PRs for you
onboarding.readOnlyDesc: Download files and manage PRs yourself

editor.noKeySelected: Select a key to start translating
editor.noKeysMatchSearch: No keys match “{query}” in the current filter.
editor.noKeysMatchFilter: Adjust the status filter to see more keys.
editor.noRepoSelectedDesc: Go to Projects and open a repository to start editing translations.

permissions.readOnlyTooltip: Write access not granted — download files to manage PR manually

settings.title: Settings
settings.themeDescription: Light, dark, or follow your system.
settings.reposEmpty: No repositories yet. Connect GitHub from Integrations to add some.

admin.title: Admin
admin.removeMemberConfirm: Remove this member from the organization?
admin.createOrgDescription: Pick a name and a URL-safe slug. Slug must be 1–40 chars, lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes.
admin.inviteDescription: We'll email an invite link valid for 24 hours.

noOrg.heading: You're not part of any organization yet.
noOrg.description: Ask your {brand} admin to invite you to an organization. Once invited, sign in again with this email and you'll be added automatically.

subProjects.title: Select a sub-project
subProjects.description: We found multiple translation roots in {repo} on {branch}.

projects.emptyDescription: Connect GitHub from Settings → Integrations to grant access to repositories on this organization.

auth.disclaimer: Loki will request access to your repositories. You choose which ones.

magicLink.sentBody: We sent a magic link to {email}.
magicLink.sentBodyNoEmail: We sent a magic link to your email.
